arts.sum: Boavista finally put an end to their losing streak and beat Santa Clara 1-0 at home. This win may give them a morale boost, but they remain rooted to the bottom of the table, seven points off safety. ...

arts.ttl: Preview: Boavista vs. Vitoria de Guimaraes - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Primeira Liga clash between Boavista and Vitoria de Guimaraes, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
